dashboard.title: Wallet Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: HyperEVM balances, Hyperliquid vault exposure, and MasterVault deposit flow.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Once connected, this page will load your HyperEVM balances, vault exposure, and recent Hyperliquid activity.
dashboard.overviewSubtitle: Read-only aggregation from the API layer.
dashboard.recentActivitySubtitle: Latest fills returned by Hyperliquid info aggregation.
dashboard.noRecentActivity: No recent fills returned for this wallet yet.
dashboard.masterVaultStatusSubtitle: Configured from environment, executed only from the client wallet.

vaults.title: Hyperliquid Vaults
vaults.subtitle: Vault exposure for the connected wallet.
vaults.connectTitle: Connect a wallet to load vault exposure
vaults.connectDescription: This page lists vaults returned by `userVaultEquities` and `vaultDetails`.
vaults.emptyDescription: If this wallet starts following or leading a vault, it will appear here.

detail.subtitle: Vault detail from Hyperliquid `vaultDetails` and portfolio data.
detail.noDescription: No public description available for this vault.
detail.performanceSubtitle: Simple portfolio curve when Hyperliquid returns history for this vault.
detail.noChartData: No performance chart data is available for this vault yet.

deposit.title: MasterVault Deposit
deposit.subtitle: Client-side approval and deposit on HyperEVM.
deposit.disabledHint: Deposit remains disabled until `MASTER_VAULT_ADDRESS` and `MASTER_VAULT_ABI` are configured with a live adapter.
